underlying_goal: Use Playwright MCP to test my website: open it, click around the main pages, and make sure nothing looks broken.
friction_detail: User messages contained explicit frustration, which usually points to trust or convergence issues. Session ran from a workspace-path variant, which increases thread fragmentation risk.
brief_summary: Test site with Playwright MCP. I’ve confirmed multiple broken relative links. I’m finishing with a quick v2 top-navigation pass (Gateways, GPU Nodes, LP Token, Community, Resource HUB) to verify whether the primary portals themselves still render correctly.
